Chuin David lengpa le alhonpi mipi chu abonchauvin thachol tah-in Jordan vadung ahung lhunguvin ahi; Jordan vadunga chun David jong athachol akido kit tai.
Ab’salom le amite Israel mite chu Jerusalema ahunguvin, Ahith’ophel kitipa chun Ab’salom ahinlhonpi.
Chuin David golpa Arch mi Hushai chu Absalom henga ahungin, Hushai hin, “Hingsot’in lengpa, Lengpa hingsot’in” tin ahin sam tai.
Chutah chun Ab’salom jong chun Hushai jah a aseiyin, “Hiche hi nagolpa nakhohsahna hiya ong? Ipi dinga nangma nagolpa to kilhona nache lou ham?” tin adong tai.

Ahin Hushai chun Ab’salom jah a aseiyin, “Ahipoi, koi koi hijeng jong leh Pakai le hiche mite, Israel miten abonchauva alhendoh pen pen chu kei jong ama a chu kahi jengin, ama chutoh keima kalhat khom jing ding ahibouve.
Chujongle keiman koi dang kin kabol ding ham? Lengpa chapa kinbola kapan tei tei ding hi lou ham? Keiman napa kin kanabol bang banga tua nangma kin jong kabol ding ahi,” atitai.
Ab’salom chun Ahith“ophel adongin, “Nalung gel temin, ipi ibol diu hitam?” atileh;

Ahith’ophel jong chun Ab’salom jah a aseipeh-in, “Napan in ngah dinga adalhah athaikem ho henga khun galut’in lang galup pin; chutileh Israel pumpin nangma hi napa doumah lamtah a kisa nahitai, ti jadoh-uvin tin, chutah le nang to kikhut jop chengse atha hatdoh cheh ding ahi,” atipeh-e.
Hijeh chun mihon Ab’salom dingin inchunga ponbuh asonpeh-uvin, chuin Ab’salom chu Israel mi pumpi mitmu lai tah-in apa thaikemho henga alut jengin aluppi tan ahi.
Hichelaiya Ahith’ophel kitipan mi athumop tapou chu Pathen henga phun kisan tobang bang anahi; hitobang cheh a hi David le Ab’salom jong chun Ahith ‘ophel lunggel athumop hi anagel cheh lhon ahi.
Ahith’ophel kitipa chun aseibe nalaiyin, Ab’salom jah a chun, “Sepai sang som le sang ni neilhendoh sah-in lang, kipat’ing ting tujan ma man David nung del pai yinge.

Keiman David chu athachol pet tah khat’a kadel khum jeng ding, alung kasuh doipeh a, kicha tah a kaumsah ding, chutengle apanpi miho jouse jong jam mang soh diu ahi. Chutah le lengpa changseh bou katha ding ahitai,

mipi vang chu aboncha kahin puilut ding, mouthah akichenpi dingpa henga hung kipuilut banga inlama kahin puilut ding ahiuve; nangman mi khatseh bou tha dinga nahol ahin, chutengleh mipi vang chu lung mong tah a um diu ahitai,” ati.
Athusei hin Ab’salom jong alung lhaisah lheh jengin, Israel upate jong abon chauvin alung lhaisah soh hel tan ahi.
Chuphat’in Ab’salom chun aseiyin. “Arch mi Hushai jong gakou tem’uvin, aman ipi asei mong am, ngaiyu hite,” ati.

Hushai chu Ab’salom henga akoulut phat’uvin Ab’salom chun Hushai jah a aseiyin, “Ahith’ophel kitipa hin hitobang bang thu anaseitan, aman eihilnau bang banga hi ibol jeng diu hita, ahiloule nangman nasei ding hinte,” ati.
Hijeh chun Hushai jong chun Ab’salom jah a aseipaiyin, “Tuchunga Ahith ‘ophel lunggel amihilna hi thilpha ahipoi,” atitai.

Hushai chun aseibe kit nalaiyin, “Napa ahin amite ahiuvin mihat ahi, ti nangin nahetsa ahi; chujongle amaho hi akiphin lung hangsa ahiuvin, gamlah a anou kilahpeh savompi tobang ahiuve. Hiche tilou jong hin napa chu galbol themtah mi ahi kit’e; hijeh chun ama hi mipi to geh khom louhel ding ahi.

Vetan, tujengin jong ama hi achangseh a kokhuh dung khat a kisel ham, ahiloule munchom dang khat’a kisel ahibouve. Kisatna a chu mi athia hung um mong .jongleh amasa a chu ajapha jousen asei ding hetsa chu, ‘Ab’salom nungjui asepaite hijat jat athitai,’ tia bou kisei ding ahi.

Chutengle gal-hang miho alungput sakeibah kai lungput tobang jeng ho jong chu kicha a hung lung lhalhop diu ahi; ajeh chu napa chu mihat tah ahin, apanpi miho jong gal-hang jeng ahiuve, ti hi Israel pumpi het ahi.

Hijongle keima lunggel vang hileh, Israel pumpi hi Dan gama pat Beer-sheba geiyin nakoma kikhomsoh keihen lang, twikhanglen panga neldi jat aphah tengu leh nangma tah natahsan galmuna gapangle chun kati ahi.

Chuti henlang hileh mun khat beh a eihon David chu akimudoh na theipen pen a achunga ichuh cheh-uva, tola daitwi alhah bang banga achunga ikibuh lhah cheh diu, ama ahin apanpi miho jouse puma khat’a khat jeng cha jong khen neilouva idelpha jeng diu ahi.

Ijem tin David chu khosung dung khat’a jamlut jongleh, Israel pumpin khao kipatsoh keiyin tin, akhopi chu kikai mang hel’intin, song halsi khat geiya jong kidalha lou ding, vahom langa kikai mang soh ding ahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in Ah’salom le Israel miten abonchauvin aseiyun, “Arch mi Hushai alung gel hi Ahith ‘ophel lunggel san gin aphajoi,” atitauve. Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Ab’salom chunga thilse asosah nom jeh a Ahith’ophel lunggel phatah chu suh lhah ding agot ahibouve.

Chuphat’in Hushai chun thempu teni Zadok le Ahi’athar henga aseipehin, “Hitobang hin chule hiti hin Ahith’ophel chun Ab’salom le Israel upate ahilchah tai, hichun keiman jong hitobang hin kahilguh kit’in ahi.

Hijeh chun tun mi sl loi lhonin lang David jah a gaseisah lhonm, tujan hin gamthip nm palmun dunga anageh hih beh-in, itin iti jongleh anagalkai pai tei teiyin: achutilouva ahileh lengpa David le akilhonpi mite abonchauva min athagam hel diu ahitai,’ tin gasei sah lhontan,” ati.

Jonathan le Ahim’a-az chun Enrogel mun a chu anga jingji lhona, soh numei khat chea amani chu thu agapeh ji, chutengle amani chepai kit ji lhona David lengpa agaseipeh ji ji lhon ahi: ijeh-inem itileh amani hi khopi sung ahung lut ji lhon hi koimachan amu louhel ding dol ahi.

Ahin golhang khat chun amani hi amudoh tan, achen Ab’salom jah a agaseitai; hijeh chun amani jong kinloi tah-in ache mang loi lhonin, Bahu’rim khoa pasal khat insunga ahung lut lhonin ahileh, amapa hin ainvela chun twikul khat aneiye; hijeh chun amani jong twikul sunga chun alut lhonin akisel lhon tai.
Numei khat hin twikul kam sinna ding khat alan, akama chun aphan, achunga chun chang aphou khuma ahileh imacha aumlam akihedoh tapon ahi.

Ab’salom sepaite chu hiche in muna numeinu henga ahung phat’uvin amahon jong, “Ahim’a-az le Jonathan chu hoilama um lhon tam?” tia adoh-uva ahileh, numeinun jong ajah-uva aseipeh-in, “Amani chu twidung khu agalkai lhon ta men,” atipeh-e. Amaho chun agahol’uvin amudoh jou lou phat’uvin Jerusalem lama ahung kile kit tauve.

Amaho ache phat’uvin Ahim’a-az leh Jonathan chu twikul sunga konin ahungdoh lhonin, achepai lhonin David lengpa agaseipeh lhon tan ahi. Amani hin David jah a asei lhonin, “Kipatdoh loiyin lang, twidung galkai loi jengin; ajeh chu hitobang bang hin Ahith’ophel chun nang dounan lunggel phalou lou mi ahiltai,” agati lhone.
Chuphat’in David jong akipatdoh pai paiyin, ama lhonpi mipi chutoh akilhonin Jordan vadung agalkai tauve; khovah lhah phat’in Jordan vadung galkai loulai khat cha jong aum tapouve.

Ahith’ophel hi athumop koiman alahpeh lou amudoh phat chun sangan chunga touna akiphan, akhopi lama ainlama achetai. Chuin aman ain alou agoltoh soh keiyin, chujouvin amale ama akikhaiyin athitai; chuin mihon amahi apa lhankhuh ma ma a avuitauve.
David chu Mahana’im kiti laiya chun ahungin ahi. Ab’salom jong chun Jordan vadung ahinpal galkaiyin ama ahin Israel mite aboncha ahiuvin ahung tauve.

Ab’salom hin Jo’ab khel’in sepai lamkai chun Amasa anapansah tan ahi. Amasa hi Ish’mael mi pasal khat amin Ithra kitipa chapa ahin, Ithra hin Jo’ab nu, Zeru’iah sopinu Nahash kitinu chanu Ab’igal chu akichenpin ahi.
Israelte leh Ab’salom hin Gilead gamsunga ngahmun asemtauve.
David chu Mahana’im ahung lhun phat’in, Ammon mite kho Rabbah a konin Nahash chapa Shobi le Lodebar khoa kona Am’miel chapa Machir toh, chule Ro’gelim khoa kona Gilead mi Barzil’lai chutoh ahungun,
lupna jalkhun phabep le kisilna kong ho, leibel phabep toh, suhlou chang le sakol chang, neh ding an, chule changpoh kansa, louthul le bekan ahinpouvin,

khoiju le bongnoiha ahin, kelngoi jong, bongnoithao jong David le alhonpi miho neh ding chun ahinpouve; ijeh-inem itileh amaho hin aseiyuvin, “David le aloite mipi hi gamthip laiya gilkel’uva lhasam gam ahitauve,” atiuvin ahi.
David chun apanpi sepaite chu asimtoh soh keiyin, achunguva mi asang sang chunga lamkai ding, aja ja chunga lamkai ding agoltoh soh tan ahi.

David chun sepai hop thuma hop khat chu Jo’ab alamkaisah-in, hop thuma hop khatma chu Jo’ab sopipa, Zeru’iah chapa Abi’shai alamkaisah kit’in, chutengle hop thuma hop khat kitma chu Git mi It’tai alamkai sah-e; miho jah a hin Lengpan aseiyin, “Keima tah jong nang ho toh gal ikon khom diu ahi,” ati.

Ahivangin mipin aseiyuvin, “Nangma gal nakondoh louhel ding ahibouve. Ijeh-inem itileh keiho hi hung galjam jongu leng, amahon iman igel khoh pouvinte, keiho akeh khat hel thi jeng tau jong leng amahon ima agel deh lou diu ahi. Nangma vang keiho mi sang som to kibang nahi; chujongle nangman khopi sunga kona keiho panpi mi nahinsol thojoh ding hi thilphajo ahi,” atiuve.

Hichun lengpan jong aseiyin, “Ipi hitajongle nang ho dinga aphapen tah hiding chu keiman kabol jeng ding ahi,” atitai. Hijeh chun lengpa chu kelkot phunga adingdenin, sepaite vang chu aja jan asang sangin akitoldoh tauve.

Chuin lengpan Jo’ab le Abi’shai chule It’tai chu ahil dim demin, “Keima ja nan gollhangpa Ab’salom chu lung neng tah in hinbol’uvin,” ati. Ab’salom chung changa lengpan sepai lamkai mithum athu lhah na chu mipin abonchan ajasoh keiyuve.
Hiti hin sepaite chu gamlah a Israelte toh kisat din akondoh tauve; hichea chun Ephraim mite gamsung gammang lah a gal akisat tauvin ahi.
David sepaiten Israel mite ajouvun, hiche nikhoa mi athau chu atam lheh jengin, mihem sang som ni alhinge,
Gamsung pumpia gal akithechansoh keitan, chemjama kisat lih sangin gammang lah a ohlih mihem atamjon ahi.

Ab’salom jong chun David sepaite atoh kha khel khel’in ahi. Ab’salom chu asakolpol chunga hung tou ahin, hichun sakolpol chu gangpi thing lentah khat abah kainel nul lah khat ahin a lhailut’in abah lah ahopan ahileh, Ab’salom chu aluchang gangpi bah lah a a-oh den tai; hichun Ab’salom chu van le lei kah a akikhai den in, sakolpol chun adalhan anoiya achepaitan ahi.
Mi khat chun Ab’salom chu amudoh phat’in Jo’ab jah a aseipeh tai; “Ven, keiman Ab’salom chu gangpi phung bah lah a akikhaiden kamui,” ati.

Jo’ab jong chun ajah a thuseipa chu adong loi jengin, “I-nasei ham, Ab’salom kamui natim! Ibola hikoma chu tola nasat lup da ham? Chutin hinbol le chun keiman dangka shekel som khat beh le konggah khat nape dinga chu,” ati.

Ahivangin mipa chun Jo’ab jah a aseiyin, “Keiman kakhut’a hi dangka shekel sang khat gih a gih katham khah hita jongleh lengpa chapa thana dingin kakhut lam hih hel inge; ijeh-inem itileh keiho jah tah-in jong lengpan nangma le Abi’shai chule It’tai thu nape cheh-uvin, ‘Keima ja nan gollhangpa Ab’salom chu ahingin hinhoi tei teiyun,’ tin aseibouve.
Lang khatma hiti hin keiman kathi le thi, tin joule nal’in hinbol jeng jong leng, lengpa mudin imacha akisel theiya aumdeh pon, chutengle nangman nang ding bou nagela neidon louhel ding ahi,” ati.

Hichun Jo’ab’in aseipaiyin, “Keiman hitobang hin nangto phat sumang mang ponge,” atin; gangpi phung bah lah a Ab“salom ahing nalaiya aum pet chun, Jo’ab chun tengcha chom thum alan agah peiya ahileh Ab’salom lung chang dontah a akiphut tai.
Chujouvin Jo’ab galvonpoa pang gollhang sepai som khat’in Ab’salom aumkim’uvin, adengun athat tauve.
Jo’ab chun saki pengkul amut’in ahileh sepaiho chu Israelte nung adelnauva konin ahung kilesoh keitauve; ajeh chu Jo’ab chun ajah da ahitai.

Chuin amahon Ab’salom long chu adom’uvin gammang lah a kokhuh lentah khat sunga aleh lut’uvin, achunga songtum jengjeng alhuh lentah-in aset khum’uvin ahi; Israelte vang chu ama ama inlam cheh a akijam lut soh tauvin ahi.

Ab’salom hin ahinlaiyin lengpa phaijanga chun khom khat anaphutdoh-in ahi; ijeh-inem itileh aman anaseiyin, “Keiman kamin man louna dingin chapa la kaneipon,” atin, akhom phudoh chu ama min aputsah-in, hijeh chun hiche hi tuni geiyin Ab’salom kihet jingna tin akiseiye.
Chujouvin Zadok chapa Ahi’ma uz kitipa hin “Keima lhaijing ting, Pakaiyin amelmate khut’a konin ama ahuhdoh tai, tin lengpa David jah a gaseipeh tange,” ati.

Ahinla Jo’ab chun ajah a aseiyin, “Tunia nangma thupole napan thei lou ding ahi; nidang dang leh thupon pang nan nate, tunia vang thupoa napan thei louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh lengpa chapa athitai,” ati.
Jo’ab chun Cush mipa jah a “Nangma chen lang nathilmu pen pen chu ipi hitam, lengpa gaseipeh tan,” ati. Chuin Cush mipa jong chu salam bolnan akunin, chujouvin alhai jel tai.

Chujouvin jong Ahi’mauz kitipa Zadok chapa chun Jo’ab jah a asei kit nalaiyin, “Asoh soh soh jeng hen, kei jong Cush mipa nunga khun lhai tange,” atikit leuve. Jo’ab chun aphoh-in, “Nathupoh jeh a kipaman bon mulou dinga, ipipen deichatna a nangma nalhai jeng ding ham chapa?” ati.

Ahivangin aman, “Asoh soh soh jeng hen, kei jong lhai jeng inge,” atia aseikit phat chun, Jo’ab jong chun ajah a aseipeh-in, “Lhaijo lhaiyin,” atitai. Chutah chun Ahi’ma-az chu phaicham lang lampia alhaiyin ahileh Cush mipa chu akhel tai.

David chu kelkot teni kikah a tou jing jeng ahin, kelkot ngahpa chu kelkot chung, inchunga chun akaldoh-in, palvuma chun aumin, akhoda u agahvet’a ahileh pasal khat achangseh a halhaiya hung lhai amun ahi.

Chuphat’in kelkot ngahpan lengpa ahinkouvin aseipeh tai. Lengpan jong aleseipeh kit’in, “Ahung lhaipa chu achangseh ahileh, thupha sei ding ahinpoh ahi,” ati. Am a chu ahung lhailut pai paiyin, ahin nailut tai.

Chuin kelkot ngahpan michom khatma amukit’in, ama jong chu ahung lhai lhai jenge; chuphat’in kelkot ngahpan kelkot phung lam chu ahinkouvin, “Ven, ven, mi khat jong achangseh-in ahung lhai kit’e,” ati. Lengpan jong aseikit’in “Ama jong khun thupha ahinpoh hiya khu,” ati.
Kelkot ngahpa chun, “Ahung lhai masajo pa khu Zadok chapa Ahi’ma-az lhaitoh kakilomsah lheh jenge,” atileh; lengpan jong, “Ama chu mipha ahin thupha ahinpoh hiteiyin te,” ati.

Chutah chun Ahi’ma-az hin lengpa ahinkouvin, “Ijakai aphasoh keiye,” ati. Chujongle ama chu lengpa angsunga aboh khup’in tola amai asulut’in aseitai, “Pakai na-Pathen, kapu lengpa douna akhut lam jouse eipedoh soh keiyuvah ma chu nun nom hen,” ati.

Hichun lengpan jong adong loiyin, “Gollhangpa Ab’salom ima tilou hinam?” atileh, Ahi’ma-az chun adonbut’in, “Nasohpa hi Jo’ab’in eihinsol pet chun mihonpi kinong lui lui kamun, ipi iti ham ti kahepoi,” atitai.
Chuphat’in lengpan jong, “Kikhindoh loiyin hikoma khun gading tan,” atileh; ama jong akikhindoh pai jengin, ading thip beh jeng tai.

Vetan, hichun Cush mipa chu ahung lhung paitan ahi; chuin Cush mipan aseiyin, “Kapu lengpa dingin thupha tah kahinpoi! Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin tunin nangma dou dia kipan mite khut’a konin nahuhdoh tan ahi,” ati.

Lengpan jong Cush mipa chu adong paiyin, “Gollhangpa Ab’salom ima tilou hinam?” atileh; Cush mipan adonbut’in, “Kapu lengpa melmate jouse leh nangma douna thilse bol dinga kipan jouse hiche gollhangpa chutoh bang soh keiyu hen,” atitai.

Chuphat’in lengpa chu adip dam behseh jengin, kelkot hunga indan chung nunga chun akaldoh-in, akap tai; achepum pumin, “O kachapa Ab’salom, kachapa; kachapa Ab’salom! Nang khela kei kathileh iti ham, vo Ab’salom, kachapa, kachapa!” atin ahi.
Jo’ab jah a chun “Vetan, lengpa David chun Ab’salom pul adou lel’in akap kap jeng tai,” tin agaseipeh tai.
Hijeh chun hiche nikhoa gal kijo chu mipi abonchauva din pul douna asohdoh jo tan ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche nikho hin mipin a bon chan ajauvin, “Lengpan achapa thi adou lel lheh jenge,” akititai,
Sepaite jong chu hiche nikho hin guhthim chan khopi sunga ahung kijot lut’uvin, gal alel niuva jachat thoh a hung vahlut bangin ahung lut tauve.
Lengpan amai akikhun, othongje jun lengpa akap jah jah jengin, “Vo Ab’salom kachapa, kachapa Ab’salom, kachapa!” atin asam sam jenge.

Hichun Jo’ab jong lengpa insunga ahung lut’in aseitai, “Tuni hin nangman nasepaite jouse nangma nahinkho ahin, nachate numei pasal jouse hinkho jong chule najite leh nathaikemho hinkho huhhinga pangjouse mai najumsah tai;

ipijeh-inem itileh nangman nahotbolte nalungset jon, nalungset te joh nahotboljo tai. Ajeh chu tunin nangman kichentah-in naseidoh tan, gal lamkaiho leh sepaite hi nang dinga imacha louva pang danin nabol tan ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh tuni hin Ab’salom chu kihinghoi hen lang keiho dang hi kabonchan thigam jengu leng nangma nalung lhaijo ding ahiye.

Hijeh chun tun kipatdoh-in lang potdoh pai paiyin nasohte henga thu ngeitah-in hung sei loiyin; ijeh-inem itileh Pakai mina kihahsel kahi, nangma nahung potdoh louva ahileh tujan jenga jong mihem khat’ a khat chan jong nagepi louhel ding ahitai; chuti hen lang hileh, nachapa gollhangpa a kona nachunga hung lhung thilse hijat sanga jong hiche thilsoh ding hi khohjo ding ahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in lengpa jong akipatdoh jengin kelkot phunga atouna chun atoutai. Hichun mipi abonchajah a aseipeh-uvin, hi tin aseiyuve, “Vetan, lengpan khu kelkot phunga atoutai,” atiuva ahileh; chuphat’in mipi a bonchauvin lengpa angsunga ahung kitol lutsoh tauve, Israelte vang chu ama ama inlam cheh a ajam lut soh tauve.

Israel phung chujat lah a chun mipi abonchan aboilah-lah jenguvin, hitin aseiyuve, “Lengpa David chun imelmateu khut’a kona einahuhdoh-uva, Philistine mite khut’a konajong inahuhhingu ahi; tua hi ama Ab’salom agin jeh a gamsunga kona jamdoh ahitai;
ahinla eihon ichunguva leng chang dinga thao inupau Ab’salom chu galmuna athitai. Chuti ahileh ibola tua hi lengpa puilut kitna dinga imacha seilouva naumu hitam?” akitiuve.

David lengpan jong thempu teni Zadok le Abi’athar henga thu athot’in hi tin aseiye, “Judah mi upate jah a seipeh lhonin lang, ‘Lengpa henga Israel dang jouse thu hung lhungsoh ta, ipi dinga nang ho hi lengpa aina puilut kit ding thuseiya anukhah pen a pang nahiuvam?
Nang ho hi keima inkote mong mong nahiuvin, kaphe le kavou nahiuve; ahileh ipi dinga nang ho lengpa pui ding thusei nukhah a napan diu ham?’ ati tilhonin.

Chujongle Amasa jah a jong naseipeh lhon ding, ‘Nang hi keima phe le vou nahi lou ham? Tua lhah nang hi Jo’ab panmun khela sepaite lamkaiya napan lou pou pouva ahileh Pathenin abolnom nomin eibol hen, akhoh cheh jon jong eibol hen, kapansah ding nahi,’ tin aseiye, nati lhon ding ahi,” ati.

David chun Judah mite chu mihem khatseh abahsah jengin alungu akitoh del’in, athu nunin, hijeh chun amahon thu ahin thot paiyun, lengpa henga chun, “Nang le nasepaite nabonchauvin hung kile kit jenguvin,” atiuvin ahi.
Hichejeh hin lengpa jong ahung kile kit’in ahileh Jordan vadung ahung lhung tan ahi; Judah jong chu lengpa ∑lamtoa Jordan vadunga apui galkai din ahungin Gilgal ahung lhung tai.
Gera chapa Shim’e-i kitipa Benjamin phunga mipa jong chu Bahu’rim khoa pat’in David lengpa lamto din kinle bongin Judah mite chutoh ahung kilhonsuh tai;

Shim’e-i hin Benjamin phunga mijeng jeng sang khat ahinpuiyin ahi. Chule Saul insunga soh a pangpa Ziba jong chu achapa som le nga ho le asohte mi som ni chutoh kilhonin Jordan Vadung lam lengpa masanga ahung lhaisuh jengin ahi.

Amaho hin lengpa lung dei bolna dingin Jordan vadung palmun noh gal kaiya lengpa insung mite gapui galkai din agouve. Lengpan Jordan apal galkai got chun Gera chapa Shim’e-i hi lengpa angsunga aboh khup jengin,

lengpa jah a chun aseitai, “Kapun themmo nei chansah dan lang, kapu lengpan jerusalem nadalhah nikhoa thilse kabol adih lou jong chu neigeldoh peh datan; hiche thil dih lou kibol chu nalungsunga ching hih beh-in.
Ijeh-inem itileh keima kachonsetai, ti nasoh pan kahetdoh ahitai; hichejeh a chu vetan, tunia hi hung kahi; Joseph insung mite lah a kapu lengpa lamto dinga ahung masapen kahi,” ati.
Hichun Zeru’iah chapa Abi’shai chun ahouvin, “Aman Pakai thao nusa lengpa agaosap jeh a hiche Shim’e-i kitipa hi tha jeng ding hilou ham?” atileh;

David chun aphoh-in, “Nang ho hi ikalo ding nahiuvam, Zeru’iah chapate nang ho hi? Tunia nang ho keima kidoupia napan jeng theiyu hi? Tunia hi Israel mite lah a mi kithat ngai mong ding hiya ong? Ajeh chu tunia hi keima Israel leng kahi, ti kahet louva nabolu ham?” atitai.
Chuin lengpan Shim’e-i jah a aseiyin, “Nangma thipon nate,” ati. Hiti hin lengpan achunga kihahselna aneitai.

Saul chapa Mephib’osheth jong chu lengpa lamto din ahung suh tai; ama hin akengphang jong akisuh thengpon, akhamul jong akisuhjol pon, aponsil jouse jong akisop poi, lengpa apotdoh nikhoa pat damsela ahung kile kit kahsea hitia hi anaum um jeng ahi.
Jerusalem a kona lengpa lamto dia ahung phat chun lengpan jong ajah a aseiyin, “Mephib’osheth, ibola nangma keito kilhona nahung lou ham?” atileh;

aman jong adonbut’in, “Vo kapu, lengpa, kasohpan eilhep lhah ahi; ajeh chu nasohpa kei hi akengbai kahin, hijeh a chu nasohpa hin kasohpa jah a chu, ‘Katouna ding sangan khat achunga atoumun gakantan’ katileh;
ama chun nasohpa kei hi kapu lengpa henga eina tamsen ahi. Hijongleh kapu lengpa nangma hi Pathen Vantil tobang nahi; chuti ahileh chun nangman pha nasah sah chu bol jengin.

Ijeh-inem itileh kapa insung mite jeng jong chu kapu lengpa angsunga athi ding bep’a ana um cheh ahibouvui; hijongle nasohpa kei hi nangman na ankonga an ne dinga neina gon kit nalai ahi. Hiche kalvala hi keiman ipi thu neina kanei nah laiya lengpa henga ngeh le thum kanei nah lai ding ham?” ati.
Hichun lengpan ajah a aseiyin, “Ipi dinga nangman nachung chang thudol ave vela nasei nah lai ham? Gamsung hi nang le Ziba nakihom lhon dinga keiman kaseitohsa ahita men,” atipeh-e.
Chuin Mephib’osheth chun lengpa jah a aseiyin, “Vo lengpa kapu, lengpa bon inlama damsela hung lhung theiya hitan, Ziban agam chu abonchan kilah jeng hen,” ati.
Gilead mi Barzil’lai kitipa jong chu Ro’gelim khoa konin ahung suh tai; amahi lengpa chutoh Jordan vadung geiyin akilhonin, Jordan vadunga thah galkai din agoi.

Barzil’lai kitipa hi tehsepu mong mong ahitan, akum jong som get alhing tan ahi; lengpa David Mahana’im khoa apansat laiya jong chu ama hin neh le chah anakhan jing jeng ahi; ijeh-inem itileh ama hi mihao tah khat ahiye.
Lengpan Barzil’lai jah a aseiyin, “Keito kilhonin hung pai paitan, Jerusalema kei neh neh naneh sah nange,” tin ajoltai.
Ahivangin Barzil’lai chun lengpa jah a aseiyin, “Keima kum ijatpi hing nalai ding kahiya, tua keima lengpa to kilhona Jerusalem lenga kache ding ham?

Tunia keima kakum somget lhingta, keiman itijong thilpha thilse deile deilou jong kadat khen nah lai ding ham? Nasohpa hin kaneh jong kadon jong atui a-al kahet nah beh ding ham? Kei hin pasal ho lasah gin ngei le numeiho lasah gin ngei jong kahet thei mong ding hinam? Chuti ahileh ipipen tah a nasohpa hi kapu lengpa dinga lung gimbe sah bep khat a kahung um ding ham?
Nasohpa keiman Jordan vadung gal phabep khat’-a khun lengpa nahung kilhonpi nange. Hijeh a chu lengpan ipipen tah a tohman neipeh khoh khoh ding ham’?

Lungset tah-in neinung sol kit’in lang keima khopi sungma ma a kathiden theina ding, kapa le kanu lhankhuh a kalup theina dingin, amavang nasohpa Chimham hikoma umpa hi kapu lengpan kipuiyin lang kilhonpi tan, nangin ama ding hin pha nasah lam lam chu bolpeh tan,” ati.

Chuphat’in lengpan jong adonbut’in, “Chuti ahileh Chimham hi keitoh kilhon nange, nangin naphasah sah chu ken ama hi kabolpeh ding ahitai; chujongle nangin jong keiya kona nadeichan chu kabolpeh ding nahi,” ati.“
Chuphat’in mipi abonchauvin Jordan vadung agalkaiyuvin, lengpa jong agalkaitai; lengpan Barzil’lai chu achop’in, phatthei aboh paiyin, hichun Barzil’lai jong ama in langa ahung kile kit tai.
Lengpa chu Gilgal geiyin achen, chule Chimham chun lengpa akilhonpi peh tai; Judah mite chengse leh Israel mite keh khat jen chun lengpa hi alampia ahinpuipeh jenguve.

Israel mite abonchauvin lengpa henga ahunguvin chule lengpa jah a chun aseitauve, “Ipi dinga kasopiteu Judah miten nangma naguh manguva, lengpa le ainsung mite hi Jordan vadung agalkaisah jenguva, hitia hi David le amite ahitibol jengu hi tam?” atiuve.

Hichun Judah miten Israel mite abonchauvin adonbut’uvin, “Lengpa hi keiho inko kakinaipiu ahi. Ipi dinga nang ho hiche thudola hi lung hang nahiuvam? Keiho hin lengpa sonna a an kaneh uva nagel’u ong? Ahilou jongle ama hin keiho thilpeh khat tou eipeh-uva nabolu ham?” atiuve.

Hichun Israel miten Judah miho chu adonbut’uvin, “Keihon lengpa a kon hin chan ding jatsom kaneiyun, David chunga jong keihon nangho sangin chan ding tamjo kaneiyuve. Ipi dinga nang hon keiho hi donlou dailouva neikoiyu ham? I-lengpau ganung puilut kit ding thuseiya keiho apang masajo ding kahiu hilou ham?” atiuvin ahi. Hichea akinel nauva hin Israel mite thusei ho sang chun Judah mite thusei ho chu ahatjon akhoh joi.

@@Hikoma hin hiche lai hin pannabei mi khat anaumin amapa chu amin Sheba akiti, ama hi apa min Bichri ahin, Benjamin phunga mi ahiye; Sheba kitipa hin saki pengkul amut gingin lhang asamin aseitai, “David koma eihon chan ding inei pouvin, Jesse chapa henga goulo ding inei pouve; Vo Israel mite, Nangma nangma ponbuh kijot cheh tauvin,” ati.

Hijeh chun Israel mite abonchauvin David adalhahsoh hel’uvin, Bichri chapa Sheba nung ajui cheh tauve; ahivangin Judah miten alengpau chu lunglut tah-in Jordan vadunga pat Jerusalem geiyin ajui lut peh tauvin ahi.

David chu Jerusalem a ahungin ain ahung lhungtai; chuin lengpan in ngah dinga adalhah thaikem numei som khat chu abonchan aman khomsoh keiyin in khat’a akhol’in, mi angah ding sepai akoiyin, neh le chah vang apenan, amaho hi avil tapon, aluppi tapoi. Hijeh chun amaho hi athi ni geiyuvin cha hing louvin aumsoh keiyun, meithaisa bangin a umsoh keitauve.
Lengpan Amasa jah a aseipeh-in, “Nithum sungin Judah phunga mite a bonchan koukhomsoh soh keiyin lang, nangma tah jeng jong hikoma hin hung kikhomuvin,” ati.
Hijeh chun Amasa jong Judah mite kou din akondoh tai; ahinla ama dinga aphat kiteppeh chu ahinsu khel del tan ahi.

Chuphat’in David chun Abi’shai jah a aseipaiyin, “Tua hi Sheba kitipa Bichri chapa khun Ab’salomin eibol nau sanga khohjoa eibol diu ahi; nangman napu lhacha sepaite’ khu kipuiyin lang anung delpeh-in lang, gamantan, achutilouva ahileh ama hin kulpi kikaikhum khopi phabep akisah doh a eiho eisuh genthei diu ahi,” ati.

Abi’shai nungjuiyin Jo’ab jong, Chereth mite jong, Peleth miho jong, chule mihat mipao jouse abonchan akitolsoh keiyuvin ahi. Amaho hi Jerusalem khopia Konin Bichri chapa Sheba nung del dingin akondoh tauve.

Amaho hi Gibeon khopia songpi lentah phung ahung geiyuvin Amasa jong amaho lamto dingin ahung tai. Hichun Jo’ab hi sepai vonin akivonin, akongjanga chun konggah khat hin chemjam apaiyin anakoi; amasang lama achepheiya ahiphat chun achemjam ahung kitholdoh paitan ahi.
Hichun Jo’ab hin Amasa jah a aseiyin, “Sopi nadam dam hinai mo?” tin adongin, hiti chun Jo’ab hin Amasa chu akhut jetlamin amanin abengmul chun atuh chah jengin abeng achop tai.

Hichea hi Amasa hin Jo’ab’in akhut’a chemjam akidop lam anahet lou ahiye; hiti hin Jo’ab chun Amasa chu achemjam choiyin asat’in apumpi chu tola asat lha jenge; a vela sat kit louhel’in khatvei seh chun ama jong athidel jengin ahi. Chujouvin Jo’ab le asopipa Abi’shai chun Bichri chapa Sheba nung adelpai pai tauve.
Chule Jo’ab sepaite lah a mi khat chu Amasa long phunga aga dingin aseiye, “Koi koi hijongle Jo’ab panpia David dinga pang jouse chun Jo’ab nung jui cheh hen,” ati.

Amasa vang chu lamlen laitah a athisan lah a akisai saiyin alumden tai. Lampia hung mitin chun amudoh tenguleh ading cheh jiuve; along phunga dingpa chun mi ahung jouse adinji ji jeh chun Amasa long chu akaimangin gamlah a apolut’in, pon akhu khumtan ahi.
Chuin Amasa chu lamlen lailunga kona akaimang phat chun mipi sepai jouse jong chu Jo’ab nung juiya Bichri chapa Sheba nung del dingin achepai pai jeng tauve.
Sheba hin Israel mite phung tin anakholsoh hel’in, Bethema’acah gama Abel changei ana jot manin ahi; hijeh chun Bichri mite jouse akikhom ‘uvin ama nung ajui soh hel’uve.

Hichun Jo’ab to pangkhom mite chu abonchan ahunguvin Bethma’acah gama Abel khoa chun Sheba aumtauve. Khopi umnan pal akaiyuvin, khopi kulpi pal chutoh kingat ton lei pal chu akikhangdoh jenge; chuin amahon khopipal chu phetjal dingin agouvin avojal pantauve.
Hichun khopi sung lama konin numei miching tah khat hin mi ahin kouvin, “Ngaiyuvin, ngaiyuvin, keiman Jo’ab chu kakihoupi theina din gin hinsei peh-uvin lang hikoma hung hen, ati hintiuvin” ahinti e.

Hijeh chun Jo’ab jong a manu henga chun ahungin ahileh, numeinu chun aseitai, “Nangma Jo’ab nahim?” atia ahileh; amanjong adonbut’in, “Kahinai,” ati. Hichun numeinun jong Jo’ab jah a aseiyin, “Nasohnu keima thusei ding ho hi ngai temin,” atia ahileh; Jo’ab jong chun adonbut’in, “Ka ngaipeh nai,” ati.
Hichun numeinun aseiyin, “Masang gol lui laiyin min hitin anasei jiuve, ‘Abel khoa mi bou kidong ding ahi,’ tin aseiyun; hiti hin ipi thu hijongle anachai jiuve.

Kei jong hi Israel mite lah a chambol mi le kitahna neitah mi kahi; nangin tun Israel te din penna khopi khat hi thagam dingin nahol’e; ibola nangman Pakai goulo athilkeo hi hitia suh mang jeng ding nati ham?” ati.
Hichun Jo’ab jong chun adonbut’in, “Keiman iti hijongleh khopi kasuh mang louhel ding ahi!

Nasei chu adih poi. Ahin Ephraim gama thinglhang mi Bichri kitipa chapa khat amin Sheba kitipa chun David lengpa dou nan akhut alamtai; ama chu hinpedoh jenguvin, chutile keima khopia kona hi kakinungle jeng ding ahi,” ati. Chuphat’in numeinu jong chun adonbut’in, Jo’ab jah a aseitai, “Vetan, naseipa chu palvuma aluchang tansa hung kileh lha ding nakoma hung chu ding ahi,” atipeh-e.

Numeinu chu alungthima achihna bang dungjuiyin khopi sunga anung chen mipi jouse jah a agaseitai. Chuin mihon Bichri chapa Sheba chu alu atanuvin, Jo’ab henga chun agahsep lut tauve. Jo’ab chun saki pengkul amut paiyin, khopia kon chun akikhen cheh soh keiyun, mi jouse chu ama ama in cheh a achetauve. Jo’ab vang chu Jerusalema lengpa henga ahung kile kit tai.
Jo’ab kitipa hi Israel pumpi dinga gallamkai len pen sepai jouse vaipo ahin, Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah chu Chereth mite le Peleth mite sepai ho lamkai vaipon apangin,
chule Ador’am kitipa chu engbolna soh natonga pang ho chunga vaipon apangin, Ahilud chapa Jehosh’aphat kitipa chu thuching lekha koiyin apangin,
Sheva chu lekha sunin apangin, Zedok le Abi’athar thempun apang lhonin,
chule Ja’ir mi Ira jong vang chu David din thempum anapang nai.

David khang lai hin kum thum sungin kum kijom thel’in kel analhan, hijeh chun David jong chun iti ding ham, tin Pakai angsunga taona aneiyin adoh a ahileh, Pakaiyin ahinseiyin, “Saul chun Gibeon mite anatha jeh a Saul le ainsung mite chunga thisan so jal a themmona umjeh ahi,” ati.

Hijeh chun lengpanjong Gibeon mite chu akoukhomsoh tai; Gibeon mite hi Israel chate sung peng mi ahipouvin Amor mite chia apeng athimoh ho ahibouvui; amaho hi Israel chaten tha lou dinga anasei vanguvin, Saul chun amite Israel chate leh Judah te dinga atom ngai behseh jeh-in amaho hi thagam din anahol’in ahi.
David’in hiche Gibeon mite jah a hin aseiyin, “Ipi kabolpeh diu ham? Itobang mongin longman nasempeh theiyu leng nang hon hiche Pakai goulo amite hi phatthei naboh thei dingu ham?” tin adong tai.

Hichun Gibeon miten David jah a aseiyuvin, “Keiho le Saul chule ain sung mite kah a thu hi dangka le sana a kihou chamna thei dol jong ahipon, keihon Israel mite lah a mihem khat tou kathalo diu thu jong ahideh poi,” atiuve. Chuin David chun asei kit’in, “Ahile ken nangho dinga ipipen ba kabolpeh diuva naseiyu ham?” atileh;
Amahon jong lengpa jah a chun, “Israel gamsunga chen mun ge-mun kanei louhelna diuva keiho bahgama pang keiho suh mang dinga gopa chu,

achapa pasal sagi neipeuvin lang, keihon jong amaho chu Gibeon khoa Pakai molsang chunga khun Pakai angsunga gakhai lih jengu vinge,” atitauve. Chuphat’in David jong chun, “Chuti ahileh amaho mi sagi chu nape nau vinge,” atipeh tai.
Lengpan Saul chapa Jonathan chapa Mephib’osheth vang chu ahing hoiye; ijeh-inem itileh amanin Pakaiya kihahselna ananei lhon ahi, David le Saul chapa Jonathanin kihahselna aneisa lhon ahi.

Chuin lengpan Ai’ah chanu Saul jinu Rizpah chapa teni Armo’ni le Mephib’osheth amanin, Saul chanu Merab chapate mi nga jong amanin, amaho hi Merab hin Meho’lath mipa Barzil’lai chapa A’dri-el kitipa chutoh ahinlhon ahi;

David’in mi hijat sagi hi Gibeon mite khut’a apedoh tai; chuin amahon jong hiche pasal sagi chu molsang chunga Pakai angsunga akhaiyuvin, mi sagi jen chu athigam tauve. Amaho atha niu chu sakol chang-at kipat til, chang-at kipat til ni anahi.

Rizpah kitinu Ai’ah chanu hin khaodip pon akilah-in, songpi chung khat’a hin akhaodip pon chu aphan, chang-at kipat tila pat chun van lama kona chuhgo ahung lon kahsen apha pha jenge; sun jong le chunga leng vachate apon chunga chun atousah pon, jan teng jongle gamsa achunga chun alutsah deh poi.
Saul thaikemnu Ai’ah chanu Rizpah thilbol umchan hi David henga min aseipeh phat’in,

David jong achen Saul le achapa Jonathan gu-lheng lhon chengse beh chu Ja’besh-gil’ead kho haosate henga agalai. Hiche haosa ho hin hiche gu-lheng lhon ho hi Philistine miten Gilbo’a molsanga Saul ajo chunguva, Philistine mihon Saul le Jonathan Bethshan kholai dunga akhai nauva aga guh doh-u anahi.
David chun hikoma kon hin Saul le achapa Jonathan gulheng lhon ho chu agapon, chuin mihon amani banga kikhailih jouse gubuh chengse chutoh akoithauvin, asegom tauve.

Chujouvin mihon Saul le achapa Jonathan toh chule akikhailih jouse gubuh chengse chu achomkhom un, Benjamin gamsunga Zela khoa, Saul pa Kish lhankhuh a chun avuitauve. Miho hin lengpa thupeh bang bangin abolsoh keiyuvin ahi. Hiche nung hin Pathenin gamsung dinga mi taona angaiyin abolpeh tai.
Philistine miten Israelte dou nan gal ahinbol kit’uvin ahileh, David jong chu asepaite toh kilhonin gal akonsuh kit’in Philistine te dou nan gal agasat tauve. Hichun David jong atha achol lheh tai.

Galmuna chun Rapha galhatpa chilhah ami khat amin Ish’bi-benob kiti khat apangin, ama chu atengcha jeng jong agih dan sum-eng jeng shekel ja khat alhingin, amahin chemjam thah leh khat akonga akikon, David chu tha jeng dingin ahin go tan ahi.

Hichun Zeru’iah chapa Abi’shai chun David ahung panpin, Philistine gal-hatpa chu adel khumin athat tai. Chuphat’in David chu asepaiten ajadauvin, “Nangma tukal keiho toh gal ikonkhom louhel diu ahitai, achuti loule namoh thilo ding ahin, Israel meivah banga navah hi mit jeng thei ahi,” atitauve.
Hiche nung hin Gob muna Philistine te toh kisatna aum kittai; hichea hin Hu’shath mi Sib’becai kitipa chun Philistine gal-hat miho chilhahte lah a mi khat Saph kitipa chu athat kit’e.

Gob mun ma ma a chun Philistine te ma ma chutoh kisatna aum kit’in ahi; hichea jong hin Bethlehem khoa mi Ja’areoregim kitipa chapa Elha’nan chun Git mi Goliath athat kit’in ahi, Goliath tenglung chu tumbi tejen aphai.

Chujouvin Gath khoa gal ahungsoh kit tai; galmuna chun mi adung sang tah khat anaumin, akhut phang lang khat cheh a chun akhutjung gup gup akeh-e; chule akengphang lang khat gel a jong akhojung gup cheh akeh-in, abonchan akhojung le akhutjung som nile li alhinge; amajong hi galhat mihangte chilhah khatma ahiye.
Amahin Israelte adaithang phat’in David golpa Shim’e-i chapa Jonathan chun athat tai.
Mi hicheng li hi Gath khoa gal-hang mihatte son le chilhah cheh ahiuve; ahin abon chauvin David le asepaite khutluma alousoh hel’uve.
Pakaiyin amelmate jousea kon leh Saul khut’a kona ana huhhing jal a David in anoiya kisei la hi Pakai henga anasah ahin,
@@hitin aseiye, “Pakai chu keima dingin Kasongpi le kakulpi chule eihuhhingpa ahin,
Kakiselna Ka-Pathen le kasongpi ahi; Kapho le eihuhhinga kasakia pang, Kakulpi pal le kakiselna nahin, Eihuhhingpa nahin, Pumhat’a kinona lah a jong nei huhdoh jie.
Vahchoi lomtah Pakai henga katao jin, Kamelma tea konin huhhing kachangtai.
“Ajeh chu thina luipin eilon khomtan, Manthahna hoh lam jousen eilon khum tai;
Noimigam khaoguiyin eihen tan, Kamasanga thina ding thang aki-kam e.
“Kagenthei pet’in Pakai henga kataove. Ka-Pathen henga chun kataovin ahi. Pathen houina Aman kataona asangjin, Hichea chun anabenga kataona alut jie.
“Hichun leiset akinuh nuh jin Ling akihot tan ahi; Van todop khompi jouse jong Akiling soh hel jenge; Pathen alung han jeh chun Ling akihot jengin ahi.
Anah homsung te nia konin meikhu ahung kitungdoh-in, Akamsunga konin mi bahgam thei mei akonge; Mei-al deuje jun Pathena konin ahung kitungdoh jenge.
Aman van mun jouse asonkun jengin ahung kum lhai, Akengto noiya muthim lhangkhal akiheh jenge.
Pathen Cherub chunga atouvin alenge, Huipia akijap’a alen akimui.
Aman akimvela muthim lhangkhal akihehsah jin, Aloupina meilhang thuh tah twipin akikhange.
A-angsung vahchan thethu lah a konin Meikong amleng lung ahung lengdoh dohjie.
Pakaiyin van a konin van akithinsah jin, Hat chungnungpen chun o-thongin thu aseiye.
Aman thalpi ahinkap doh doh jin athecheh jie. Kol aphen akithejal lah lah jenge.
Chutengle twikhanglen togei geiyin akimudoh jin, Vannoi bulpi khom jouse jong akimudoh soh jie; Pakaiyin ahinpho jia, Anah homsunga ahu alha teng chutin aume.
Chung sanga konin aman eihin tuh jin, Twipi kinong lah a konin eiladoh jie;
Kamelma hattah pa a konin eihuhdoh jin, Eihotboltea konin eihuhdoh jie; Ijeh-inem itia ahileh Hitobang miho hi kei din ahatval jiuve.
Kanamsetni leh amaho hin eihin delvuh jeng jiuvin, Hijongleh Pakai hi keima panmun ahijing nai.
Pakaiyin keima munlen tah a eipuidoh jin, Eikipapi jeh-in eihuhdoh jin ahi.
“Adih a kachon jeh-in Pakaiyin kipaman eipen, Kakhut tenin thildih jeng aboljeh-in kipaman eipei.
Ajeh chu keiman Pakai lamlhah jouse kajui jingin, Agilou bolin ka-Pathen chu kajamsan khapoi.
Ijeh-inem itileh ama chonna dan jouse chu Kamaiya akilang jing jengin, Hijeh chun ama chondan jousea jong Keima kavah mang hih hel’e.
Ama angsunga keima nolnabei kahin, Themmona dinga kakihongdoh jing jenge.
Hijeh chun keima dihna jeh hin Pakaiyin kipaman eipen, Amitmua kathensel jeh hin, Pakaiyin kipaman eipei.
“Mi kitah chutoh nang jong nakitah ding, Nolnabei mi chutoh nolnabei nahi ding ahi.
Milung theng chutoh nalung theng ding, Milungkon chutoh nalung kon jeng ding ahi.
Nangman mi kineosahte chu nahuhdoh jin, Mi kiletsah te vang chu loilhah din navejinge.
Ahi, nangma hi vo Pakai kei din kathaomei nahin, Ka-Pathen nangin kei dia muthim jouse nasalvah-e.
Nang jal a keiman sepai hon khat jong kasuh gam ding, Ka-Pathen vanga palvum jong kachop khup ding ahi.
Hiche Pathen hi alamlhah achamkim kimsoh keiyin, Pakaiyin mi athutep jong agui lhung jie; Ama koma kiselte dingin Ama hi ompho ahijenge.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pathen kiti chu koi dang ham? Pakai kiti chu ahin; Songpi kiti chu koipen ham? I-Pathenu amabou chu ahiye.
Hiche Pathen hi keima kiselna det tah ahin, Kalamlhah jouse jong phatah-in eisempeh tai.
Pathenin kakengphang teni jong sajuhpi keng abahsah-in, Gamken lah a jong det tah-in eidinsah-e.
Kakhut teni jong galsatje ahil themin, Hijeh chun kabanjang te nin sumeng thalpi aheh konjin ahi.
Nangman namihuhhingna ompho neipen, Nagalvon chun keima eikhu khum jinge.
Kanoiya kapansatna ding mun lentah neihoipeh-in, Hijeh chun kakengto teni kalhonal tapoi.
Kamelmate nung kadel jin kasugam jie; Aboncha kasuh gamhel masangin kahung kileji poi.
Abonchauvin kasat chap hel jin athou tapouve, Alhuuvin kakengto noiya akijamsoh tauvin ahi.
Ajeh chu nangin galsat din tha neipen, Eidel khumpa chu kanoiya nalupsah tai.
Kamasanga kamelmate najamsah sah jin, Eihotbolte chu keiman kasugam ji tai.
Apen pen vanguvin ahuhhing diu aumpon, Pakai henga atao vangun aman adonbut deh poi.
Keiman kholai dunga leivui bangin kachilngem ngemin, Kholai dunga bonlhoh bangin kachotphan kachilgoiye.
“Gal eibol khum mitea konin neihuhdoh chun, Namtin vaipi chunga alenpenin neisemin, Kahet khah louhel miten jong Keima kin aboltauve.
Gamdang mite jong kineosah tah-in kahenga ahungun, Kathusei ajah jah uleh kathun anung jiuve.
Gamdang mite chu alung lhasop jiuvin, Agal kul’uva konin kithing thingin ahung potdoh ji tauve.
“Pakai hing jing pa, Nun nom hen kasongpi chu; Choi-at’in um hen ka-Pathen, Eihuhhingna songpi chu.
Phu eilahsah Pathen chu, Mitin kanoiya chesah a sonkun jenga;
Kamelmate lah a jenga jong eihuhdoh jia, Nangin kakidoupite chunga neichoi sangjie; Pumhat jenga mi note lah a konin jong Nangman neihuhdoh jing jin ahi.
“Hichejeh hin vo Pakai, namtin lah a navahchoi yinge, Chule namin vahchoila sange.
Lenga atun keima hi avel velin eihuhhingin, Thao anusa kei hi long louvin eingailui; David le kachilhah te din Atonsot atonsot geiya dingin,” ati.
@@Anoiya ho hi David in achaina lama anasei thu kiseiho chu ahitai: Jesse chapa David in thusoh ding asei, Choisanga umpan thusoh ding asei chu; Jacob Pathen thao nusa, Israel lah a lathempenpa chu.
“Pakai Lhagaovin keiya konin thu aseiyin, Kakamsunga um hi ama thu ahibouve.
Israel Pathenin thu aseiyin, Israel songpi chun kajah a thu aseitai; Thudih a vaihompa chun Pathen ginna avai ahom ahi.
Ama chu achunguva jingkah khovah bangin ahung vah jin, Mei kailou nia jingkah a ninou hung soh abange; Leiset chunga hamhing loudong phatthei sah Gotwi hung ju-lha tobang ahi.

Hitobanga hi keima in jong Pathena kisa dettah hi lou ham? Ijeh-inem itileh Pathenin Atonsot geiya dingin kitepna eisempin, Thil ijakai hi adanchan aumsah soh keiye. Ajeh chu Pathen chun Kei deichat jouse le eipanpi thei jouse akhansah lou ding ham?
Pathen hephaloute vang chu Lingle khao kipai mangsa tobang hi ding, Ijeh-inem itileh amaho hi khut’a Kichomkhom kit thei louhel ding ahiuve.
Hitobang miho thamkha dingjong chun Thih le tenglung akipat ding ahin, Abonchauva hi beihela Meiya kigouvam hel ding ahiuve,’ ati.

David sepaite lah a gal-hat mite chu aminu hicheng hi ahiuve: Josheb-basshe’beth kitipa chu Tah-che’mon mi ahin, amahi mi thum lah a alamkai ahi; ama hin mi jaget jen tengchan akisat pin, abonchan khatveiyin athatgam hel in ahi.

Ama ban a mihat mi thum ho lah a khat kitpa chu Aho’hi chapa, Dodo chapa Elea’zar ahi; ama hi Philistine te galbol dia ahung kikhop’u chun David toh anapang khomin, chuin Israelte chu Philistine te masanga akinungtol tauve.

EJea’zar hi akipanin abantha acholdeh kahsen Philistine te asat chap chap jengin, akhut jeng jong chu achemjam chutoh thisanin akanchah jengin ahi; hiche nikho jong chun Pakaiyin Israelte minthang tah-in gal ajosah tai; Elea’zar nunga chun sepaite thilong chom khom mai maiyin ahung kitol’uve.

Elea’zar ban a chu Shammah ahin, ama hi Harar mi Agee chapa ahiye. Lehi khoa chun Philistine te galbol din ahung kikhomuvin ahileh, akikhop nau tollhang dunga chun louthul adimset’in akeh-e; Israelte chu Philistine te gin nan ajamtauve.
Ahivangin Shammah hi det tah-in apangin, louthul lei laiya chun apange, hiti hin hahuh-in ahuh jengin, Philistine te chu a that that jengin ahileh; Pakaiyin jong minthang tah-in gal ajosah tai.
Haosa mi som thum lah ami thum chu achesuh uvin, chang-at phat don hin Adullam songko phunga chun David henga ahunguva ahileh, Rephaim phaiya chun Philistine sepai hon khat’in ngahmun anasemuve.
Hichepet hin David chu kulpi sunga anapange; chujongle Philistine mite sepaiho chu Bethlehem khopia ana pansauvin ahi.
Dangchah geovin David chun aseiyin, “Ohe, mihem khat beh-in Bethlehem khopi kulpi kelkot phunga twikula konin twi eihin dop peh hen lang don din eihung petave leh !” ati.

Hichun hiche mihat mi thum ho hin Philistine te ngahmun lailung atumkeh jenguvin Bethlehem khopi kulpi kelkot phunga twikula twi chu agathal’uvin, David henga ahindop peh tauve. Ahin David chun donjo talouvin atwi chu Pakai lhai nan tola asung lhan,

chule aseitai, “Vo Pakai, keiman hiche twi hi don hih hel inge. Iti ahinkho phal ngam hel a hiche twi thala che ho thisan tobang hiche hi keiman kadon ding ham?” ati. Hichejeh chun David in twi chu adontapoi. Thil hijatpi hi hiche mihat mithum ho chun anabolu ahi.

Jo’ab sopipa, Zeru’iah chapa Abi’shai chu mihat som thum lah a lamkaiya anapang ahi. Ama hin mihem jathum jen chu atengcha akipat’in akisat pin athat gam hel’in, mi thum ho tilouvin aminthang penin apang tai.
Mihat som thum lah ajong ama hi aminthang pen tah a pang ahi. Hijeh chun ama hi amaho gal lamkaiyin jong apange; ahivangin mihat thum ho vang chu aphajou deh poi.

Kabzeel khoa mi Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah kitipa jong chu gal-bang tah mi ahin, thil nasa tah tah boldoh jeng thei ahi; ama hin Moab mi sakei tobang ni athat’in, chujouvin nikhat hi buhbang lhah nin achesuh-in kokhuh sung khat’a sakei bahkai khat agathat kit’e.

Bena’iah hin Egypt mi pasal tha phatah khat mel-hoi tah khat jong athat’e. Egypt mipa chun akhut’a tengcha khat akichoi ahin, Bena’iah chun tenggol khat akichoiyin ajonsuh jengin, Egypt mipa khut’a konin atengcha chu asalhah peh-in, ama tengcha ma man ama chu athat tai.
Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah chun thil hijat hi anabolin, mihat mithum lah a chun aman jong minthanna akimui.
Ama jong hi mihat somthum lah a aminthang lheh nan, ahivangin mihat mithum vang chu apha jou deh pon ahi. David in amapa hi ama tahsa vengtup din apansah tai.
Mihat somthum lah a chun Jo’ab sopipa As’ahel jong khat ana hi. Elha’nan ahin, ama hi Bethlehem khoa mi Dodo chapa ahi;
Harod khoa mi Shammah ahin, Harod khoa mi ma ma Eli’ka ahin,
Paltite khoa mi Helez ahin, Tekoa khoa mi Ikkesh chapa Ira ahin,
An’athoth khoa mi Abi-e’zer ahin, Hush khoa mi Mebun’nai ahin,
Ahoh khoa mi Zalmon ahin, Netophah khoa mi Ma’harai ahin,
Netophah khoa mi Heleb chapa Ba’unah ahin, Benjamin mite lah Gib’e-ah khoa mi Ribai chapa lt’tai ahin,
Pirathon khoa mi Bena’iah ahin, Ga’ush luidung lama kona hung Hiddai ahin,
Arbath khoa kona mi Abiabon ahin, Bahu’rim khoa mi Az’maveth ahin,
Sha’ulbon khoa mi Eli’ahba ahin, Jashen le Jonathan chapa te ahiuvin,
Harar khoa mi Shammah ahin, Harar khoa mi Sharar chapa Ahi’am ahin,
Ma’acah khoa mi Ahas’bai chapa Eliph’elet ahin, Gilo khoa mi Ahith’ophel chapa Eli’am ahin,
Carmel khoa mi Hezro ahin, Arb khoa mi Pa’arai ahin
Zobah khoa mi Nathan chapa Igal ahin Gad mi Bani ahin,
Ammon mi Zelek ahin, Be-eroth khoa mi Na’aharai ahin, Zeru’iah chapa Jo’ab galvonpoa pang pa ahin,
Ithir khoa mi Ira ahin, Ithir kho ma ma u mi Garb ahin,
Hit mi Uri’ah ahin, abonchauvin somthum le sagi alhinguve.
Israel chunga Pakai ahung lung hang jah kit tan, hijeh chun aman David chu atildoh pai paiyin amaho dou nan, hitin aseiye, ‘“Nangma chen lang Israel le Judah mite gasim tan,” ati.

Hijeh chun lengpan Jo’ab le apanpi sepai lamkaiho jah a aseiyin, “Dan a pat Beersheba chan geiya cheng Israel phung jouse gakholsoh keiyun lang mijat ijat mong hitam, ti kahetdoh theina dingin mihem jat gasim tauvin,” ati.

Ahivangin Jo’ab chun lengpa jah a aseiyin, “Pakai na-Pathenin mipi chu ajat jan aja jan punsah jeng tah ta, kapu lengpan namit’a namu jing nah chu men; ipi dinga kapu lengpan hitobanga thilse bol jeng ding hi tha nopna tah a nagel ham?” ati.
Ahinla lengpa thusei chun Jo’ab le sepai lamkaiho chu ajoujo tan, hijeh chun Jo’ab le sepai lamkaite chu Israel mipi simtoh din gin lengpa angsunga konin apotdoh tauve.
Amaho hin Jordan vadung apal galkaiyun, phaicham lailunga khopi, Aro’er khopia konin asimpan’uvin, Gad lam ajonun Jazer langa acheuve.
Chujouvin Hit mite gamsunga Gilead kho le Kadesh khopi ahung gei tauve; chuin Dan khopia ahunguvin, Dan khopia konin Sidon kol alhah kit’uvin,
Tyre gammang lah ahinjot’uvin Hivi mite khopi jouse le Canaan mite khopi jousea ahunguvin ahi. Chuin Beersheba khopi Judah gamsunga Negeb a chun angauve.
Hitia hi gamsung pumpi akholsoh kei phat’uvin, lha ko le ni som ni alhin donin Jerusalem khopi ahung lhung tauvin ahi.
Chuin Jo’ab chun mihem jat asim nau mijat chu lengpa henga apelut tai; hichea kisimdoh Israel mijat chu pasal galsat thei chemjam lamthei cheh sang jaget alhingin, Judah mi chu sang ja nga alhinguve.

Mipi asimsoh phat’in David chu alungthim akisih behseh jengin, hijeh chun David in jong Pakai henga taona aneiyin aseitai, ‘“Kathilbol chung changa hin keima melse tah-in kachonsetai; hijongle tuhin vo Pakai, nahenga kahung taove, nasohpa keima themmona jouse hi la mangtan; ajeh chu keiman ngol hoitah hin thil kanaboltai,” ati.
Ajing jingkah a David chu ajingthoa ahileh, David dia mitvaneiya pangpa Gad themgao henga chun Pakaiyin hitin thu ahinseiye,

“Chen lang David jah a gaseitan, ‘Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye, “Keiman nachunga katoh ding thil thum kapeh kah nahin, hicheng lah a hin na-ngachat pen khat kilhenin, nachunga kahin lhunsah ding ahi,” tin aseiye,’ gatin,” ati.

Hijeh chun Gad jong ahungin David jah a ahung seipeh-in ajah a hiti hin aseitai, “Nagamsunga kumthum sunga kel lhah ding nanop am? Lha thum sunga nagalte masanga najamle lea amahon nadel le le diu nadei yam? Ahiloule nagamsunga nithum sunga gamna hise lansah ding nanop am? Tun geldoh soh keiyin lang eihinsolpa henga kaseipeh ding chu hoiche pen ham, dindetna neiyin,” ati.

Chuphat’in David chun Gad jah a aseiyin, “Kalung agenthei behseh jeng tai; amikhotona lentah ahinai, hijeh chun Pakai khut’a kileh lut jeng taute; mihem khut’a vang neilhah lut sah hih hel’in,” atipeh-e.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Israelte chunga jingkah a pat aphat kitep sungsen gamna hise ahin lansah tai; hichea hin Dan khoa pat Beer-sheba chan geiyin Israel mipi lah a mihem sang som sagi athiuvin ahi.

Vantil chun Jerusalem jong suhgam dinga agot’a akhut alap phat chun Pakaiyin thilse abol ding chu alung akhel’in, Vantil mi sugama pangpa jah a chun aseitai, “Aphaset tai, tun nakhut tuh tang tan,” ati. Hichepet’a hi Pakai Vantil chu Jebus mipa Arau’nah changphol koma anading ahitai.

David jong chun mi sugama pang Vantil chu amudoh phat’in Pakai jah a aseiyin hitin ati, “Vetan, keima kachonsen, gilou tah-in keiman thil kaboltai; ahinla hiche kelngoi tobang miho hin ipi abolset mongu ham? Nahenga katao ahiye, keima chungle ka inkote chunga nakhut hin lhah jon,” tin aseitai.
Hiche nikho hin Gad chu David henga ahungin ajah a aseitai, “Chetouvin lang Jebus mipa Arau’nah changphol koma khun Pakai dingin maicham khat gasemtan,” ati.
Pakaiyin Gad thu apeh bangin David jong achetou tan ahi.
Arau’nah chu akiheisuh a agahvet a ahileh lengpa le asohte ama heng lam jon a ahungu amui; chuphat’in Arau’nah jong chu apotdoh pai paiyin lengpa chu agajabol’in tola amai asulut’in ahi.

Chujongle Arau’nah chun aseiyin, “Ipi ding pen tah a kapu lengpa nangma nasoh kei koma nahung jeng hi tam?” atileh; David chun adonbut’in, “Mipi chunga gamna hise hi akitol mang theina dinga nangma changphol hi chohdoh a hikoma hi Pakai henga maicham khat semdoh ding kati ahi,” ati.

Hichun Arau’nah jongchun aseiyin, “Kilahjengin kapu lengpa, chule nangin pha nasah lam lam chu bol jeng tan; bongchal teni jong hikoma aumin, pumgo thiltoa naman ding ahi, chule changhuina kangkui ho leh bongchal teni namkol jong aum nai, hiche ho hi meithinga nati ding ahi.
Vo lengpa, keima Arau’nah kitipa hin lengpa dinga hijat hi katodoh jeng ahitai,” ati. Chujongle Arau’nah chun lengpa jah a aseitai, “Pakai na-Pathenin nasanpeh tei tei hen,” ati.

Ahivangin lengpan Arau’nah jah a aseiyin, “Ahipoi, keiman aman napeng ting kachoh ding ahibouve; aman kapeh louhel thil chu keiman Pakai ka-Pathen henga pumgo thiltoa kato lou ding ahi,” ati. Hiti hin David chun changphol le bongchal teni chu dangka shekel som ngan akichoh tai.

Chuin David chun Pakai henga maicham khat asemin, pumgo thilto le chamna kilhaina thilto atoh tai; hichun Pakaiyin jong gamsung dinga mi taona asanpeh-in, Israelte chunga konin gamna hise lang chu akitol mang tan ahi.
